onlineEvaluation.title: Online evaluation
onlineEvaluation.description: Monitor and evaluate model performance in real-time

empty.title: No online evaluations yet
empty.description:
Create a rule to automatically score your model's outputs.
Define criteria, evaluate responses in real time, and track quality over time.

deleteSingle.title: Delete evaluation rule
deleteSingle.description:
Deleting an online evaluation rule will stop scoring for all new traces. Existing traces that have already been scored won't be affected. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

Tip: To pause scoring without deleting, disable the rule.

deleteBatch.title: Delete evaluation rules
deleteBatch.description:
Deleting online evaluation rules will stop scoring for all new traces. Existing traces that have already been scored won't be affected. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

Tip: To pause scoring without deleting, disable the rules.

addEditRule.scopeTooltip: Choose whether the evaluation rule scores the entire thread, each individual trace, or each span. Thread-level rules assess the full conversation, trace-level rules evaluate one model response at a time, and span-level rules evaluate individual operations within a trace.
addEditRule.enableRuleDescription: Enable or disable this evaluation rule
addEditRule.codeMetricDisabledTooltip: Code metric cannot be updated. This feature is not available for this environment
addEditRule.loseChangesTitle: You're about to lose your changes
addEditRule.loseChangesDescription:
If you change the evaluation scope, your current rule settings — including prompt, model, and variable mappings — will be reset.
Are you sure you want to continue?
addEditRule.budgetMustBePositive: Budget must be a positive amount
addEditRule.traceVariableKeyInvalid: Key is invalid, it should be "input", "output", "metadata" (e.g. "input.message" or just "input" for the whole object), the reserved word "spans" to inject the trace's spans list, or "trace" to inject the trace skeleton with attachments
addEditRule.spanVariableKeyInvalid: Key is invalid, it should be "input", "output", "metadata" (e.g. "input.message" or just "input" for the whole object), or the reserved word "span" to inject the span with its attachments
addEditRule.maxCostDescription: Once an evaluation's spend reaches this amount the judge wraps up and returns its scores so far. Leave empty for no limit.

pythonCodeRule.variablesDescription: All variables are automatically added based on the code snippet. They are extracted from the `score` method and are required.
pythonCodeRule.variablesError: Code parsing error. The variables cannot be extracted.

ruleFiltering.traceExplainer: Apply filters and sampling to select which traces will be evaluated by this rule
ruleFiltering.threadExplainer: Use sampling rate to control how frequently this rule is applied to threads
ruleFiltering.spanExplainer: Apply filters and sampling to select which spans will be evaluated by this rule
ruleFiltering.samplingDescription: Use sampling rate to control how frequently this rule is applied. You can also add filters to select specific {{entityType}} based on their properties. If nothing is defined, the rule will evaluate all {{entityType}}.

filterValidation.customKeyInvalid: Key is invalid, it should be "input", "output", and follow this format: "input.[PATH]" For example: "input.message" or just "input" for the whole object

evaluateButton.noRulesTooltip: No online evaluation rules assigned to this project

noRulesPage.title: Automate your scores
noRulesPage.description: An automated rule is a predefined logic that scores LLM outputs in real-time based on set criteria, ensuring efficient and consistent performance assessment.

ruleRowActions.deleteDescription:
Deleting an online evaluation rule will stop scoring for all new traces. Existing traces that have already been scored won't be affected. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

Tip: To pause scoring without deleting, disable the rule.

rulesActionsPanel.deleteDescription:
Deleting online evaluation rules will stop scoring for all new traces. Existing traces that have already been scores won't be affected. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

Tip: To pause scoring without deleting, disable the rules.

runEvaluationDialog.title: Run online evaluation rules
runEvaluationDialog.description: Choose the online evaluation rules you want to apply to the selected {{entityLabel}}. Each rule will generate new scores based on its configuration.
runEvaluationDialog.noRulesMessage: No online evaluation rules assigned to this project
runEvaluationDialog.noRulesDescription: Create a new rule, or assign an existing rule in the Online evaluation page

filterValidation.customKeyInvalid: Key is invalid, it should be "input", "output", and follow this format: "input.[PATH]" For example: "input.message" or just "input" for the whole object
